architecture.realtime: Socket.IO v4 (WebSocket for live tracking, order status)
architecture.tdd: STRICT — tests written FIRST, always. Red → Green → Refactor.
architecture.deployment: Railway.app (free tier, supports PostgreSQL + Redis + Node)

buyer.description: Customer placing orders via web browser
buyer.note: Web ONLY for v1. No native mobile app.

store_owner.description: Shop owner who receives and manages orders, adds products, sets discounts/offers/advertisements

admin.description: GoRola super-admin who can see all store sales, manage users, categories, feature flags, weather mode

delivery_rider.description: NOT in v1. Store owners use own delivery staff. Rider interface is a FUTURE MODULE. Code must be modular enough to plug in with zero rewrites.
platforms: future: progressive web app or native
delivery_rider.status: DEFERRED — stub interfaces only in v1

stores_v1.note: Only two partner stores in v1. Store management panel must support N stores without code changes.

typography.body: DM Sans — all UI, labels, body text
typography.hindi: Noto Sans Devanagari — Hindi fallback text

design_system.fonts_cdn: Google Fonts — Playfair Display, DM Sans, Noto Sans Devanagari
design_system.animations: GSAP v3 (ScrollTrigger, Timeline) — all scroll animations and page transitions
design_system.ui_library: shadcn/ui components (Radix UI primitives) + Tailwind CSS v4
design_system.premium_feel: Topographic SVG backgrounds, noise texture overlays, fog drift animations, amber pulse ETA banners

weather_mode.description: System-wide UI state toggle when weather is bad (fog, rain, snow)

feature_flags.provider: Simple DB-backed feature flags (no external service for v1)

delivery.v1_model: Store owner dispatches own delivery staff
delivery.tracking: Manual status updates by store owner (Order Placed → Preparing → Out for Delivery → Delivered)
delivery.real_time_location: FUTURE — Socket.IO infrastructure ready, rider location tracking stubbed
delivery.eta: Manually configured per store + distance estimate (no live GPS in v1)

observability.logging: Pino (structured JSON logs, log levels: trace/debug/info/warn/error/fatal)
observability.tracing: OpenTelemetry SDK → Jaeger (self-hosted on Railway) OR console exporter for dev
observability.health_check: GET /health → { status, db, redis, timestamp, version }
observability.request_id: UUID v4 per request, propagated through all service calls

authentication.buyer: Phone OTP (SMS via Fast2SMS — India, free tier) + JWT access/refresh tokens
authentication.rate_limiting: Fastify rate-limit plugin — 5 OTP requests/15min per phone, 10 login attempts/15min per IP

security.input_validation: Zod schemas — ALL inputs validated at controller boundary
security.sql_injection: Prisma parameterized queries only — no raw SQL unless absolutely necessary (and reviewed)
security.xss: DOMPurify on frontend for any user-generated content rendered as HTML
security.csrf: Double-submit cookie pattern for state-changing requests
security.secrets: Environment variables only — never in source. dotenv-safe enforces all required vars.
security.uploads: Multer + file type validation + virus scan stub (ClamAV future)

database_schema_entities: DeliveryRider (stub — empty table, ready for future)
RiderLocation (stub — empty table, ready for future)
StockMovement (append-only inventory ledger — every stock change recorded)
ProductVariant fields to add: lowStockThreshold (Int default 5), isLowStock (Boolean default false), isInStock (Boolean default true)

test_strategy.philosophy: TDD is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Write failing test → make it pass → refactor.
test_strategy.unit_tests: Service layer — pure business logic. Mock all dependencies.
test_strategy.integration_tests: Repository layer — real DB (test schema). Controller layer — real HTTP with Supertest.
test_strategy.e2e_tests: Playwright — critical buyer journeys (browse → cart → checkout → confirmation)
test_strategy.test_database: Separate 'gorola_test' database — migrated fresh before test suite
test_strategy.coverage_threshold: 80% lines minimum. 100% on auth and payment flows.
test_categories_per_feature: Edge cases (empty state, boundary values, race conditions)
Error cases (invalid input, network failure, DB error)
Security cases (SQL injection attempts, unauthorized access, token tampering)

phase_1_nfr.name: NFR Foundation
steps: 1.1 Monorepo setup (pnpm workspaces, tsconfig, eslint, prettier)
1.4 Fastify server bootstrap + plugins (helmet, cors, rate-limit, request-id)
1.5 Authentication system (OTP, JWT, refresh) + full TDD
1.8 GitHub Actions CI (lint + test + build on every PR)
1.10 Smoke test — deploy to Railway, hit /health from the internet

phase_2_buyer_web.name: Buyer Web Experience
steps: 2.8 Cart (sidebar on desktop, drawer on mobile)

phase_3_store_panel.name: Store Owner Panel
steps: 3.6 Offer & discount management (percentage, flat, coupon codes)

phase_4_admin.name: Admin Panel
steps: 4.2 All-stores sales dashboard (revenue, orders, by store)
4.6 Feature flag management (UI toggle for all flags)

phase_5_future.name: Rider Interface (Future Module — Do Not Build Yet)
phase_5_future.note: All DB tables (DeliveryRider, RiderLocation), API routes (/api/v1/rider/...), and Socket.IO events are STUBBED with TODO comments. Zero implementation. Plug-in ready.
